_provenance.source: Du (2026), Table 4 + §4.2 decomposition. Binary-binary disputed subset (Yes/No first proposal AND Yes/No final payoff).

sample_frame: Binary-binary disputed subset: first proposal in {Yes, No} AND final payoff in {Yes, No}, with pre-proposal trade in the [-30d, 0d) window. N=1,066.
methodology_note: Brier score against the binary final settled outcome, using pre-proposal Yes-token price (last trade within 7 days). Revised contracts (20.6% of sample) carry 72.0% of pooled Brier loss; confirmed contracts (79.4%) carry 28.0%. Within-final-outcome revised-minus-confirmed Brier gap is +0.30 (S=No cell) and +0.27 (S=Yes cell).
